summary: Completed testing of 10 new customer engagement features (Batch 2) for BidBlitz Penny Auction Platform. All 28 backend API tests passed (100%). All 4 frontend pages tested successfully with authentication.

favorites_api.GET /api/favorites/my-favorites: PASS - Returns user favorites list with count
favorites_api.POST /api/favorites/add: PASS - Adds category/product to favorites with price alerts
favorites_api.GET /api/favorites/live-alerts: PASS - Returns alerts for active auctions on favorites
favorites_api.Auth check: PASS - Returns 401 when no token provided

teams_api.GET /api/teams/my-team: PASS - Returns user's team info or has_team: false
teams_api.POST /api/teams/create: PASS - Creates team with code and max_members
teams_api.Auth check: PASS - Returns 401 when no token provided

bid_refund_api.GET /api/bid-refund/stats: PASS - Returns VIP status, refund rates, and statistics

auction_replay_api.GET /api/auction-replay/best-times: PASS - Returns best bidding hours and days analysis

vip_lounge_api.GET /api/vip-lounge/access: PASS - Returns VIP access status with upgrade hint

birthday_api.GET /api/birthday/status: PASS - Returns birthday status and bonus info
birthday_api.Auth check: PASS - Returns 401 when no token provided

wishlist_api.GET /api/wishlist/top: PASS - Returns top voted product wishes (public)
wishlist_api.POST /api/wishlist/suggest: PASS - Creates product suggestion with auto-vote

streak_protection_api.GET /api/streak-protection/status: PASS - Returns current streak (3 days), protection status, milestones
streak_protection_api.Auth check: PASS - Returns 401 when no token provided

frontend_streak_page.Milestones: PASS - Shows 1 Woche, 2 Wochen, 1 Monat, 2 Monate with bid rewards

frontend_birthday_page.Birthday display: PASS - Shows '15. Juni' with '133 Tagen' countdown
frontend_birthday_page.Bonus info: PASS - Shows 10 Gebote for standard tier
frontend_birthday_page.VIP levels: PASS - Shows Standard (10), VIP (15), VIP Gold (20), VIP Platinum (25), VIP Diamond (30)

frontend_teams_page.Members: PASS - Shows 1/3 Mitglieder with 'kunde' as Leader
frontend_teams_page.Contribute bids: PASS - Shows 'Gebote einzahlen' input and button

frontend_wishlist_page.Title: PASS - Shows 'Produkt-Wünsche' title
frontend_wishlist_page.Top wishes: PASS - Shows TestProduct123 and TestProduct_bd29d2 with vote counts

critical_code_review_comments: Fixed route conflict: /api/wishlist/suggest was being caught by auctions router's /api/wishlist/{auction_id}. Renamed auctions router routes to /api/auction-wishlist/{auction_id}
Fixed duplicate wishlist_router import in server.py (line 52 and 85) - renamed second import to product_wishlist_router
All 10 engagement features implemented correctly with proper API structure
Streak Protection shows correct 3-day streak with milestone rewards
Birthday Bonus shows VIP-tiered rewards (10-30 bids based on level)
Team Auctions allows team creation, joining via code, and bid contribution
Product Wishlist allows suggestions and voting with category filtering
updated_files: /app/backend/tests/test_engagement_features.py - Created comprehensive test suite for 10 engagement features
/app/backend/routers/auctions.py - Renamed /wishlist/{auction_id} to /auction-wishlist/{auction_id} to fix route conflict
seed_data_creation: Test products created via wishlist suggest API during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: 10 new engagement features fully tested and working: Favorites with Smart Alerts, Team Auctions (group bidding), Bid Refund for VIP, Auction Replay & Statistics, Flash Coupons, VIP Lounge Chat, Birthday Bonus, Auction Insurance, Product Wishlist Voting, Streak Protection. All APIs return correct data. Frontend pages load correctly with proper data-testid attributes. Route conflict between wishlist router and auctions router was fixed by renaming auctions router's wishlist routes.
